--- title: `nbdev_tutorial` module keywords: fastai sidebar: home_sidebar summary: "Examples and getting familiar with this development environment." description: "Examples and getting familiar with this development environment." nb_path: "index.ipynb" ---
{% raw %}
{% endraw %}

This file will become your README and also the index of your documentation.

Install

pip install nbdev_tutorial

How to use

A little shoutout to Aunt Bethany of Christmas Vacation... "Come on, Aunt Bethany, let's say hello everybody."

{% raw %} 
say_hello('everybody')

'Hello everybody!'
{% endraw %}

There are a couple of Easter eggs in this function.

{% raw %} 
say_hello('Jimmy McGill')

"S'all good, man."
{% endraw %}

There's a class, too!

{% raw %} 
greet = HelloSayer('everybody')
greet.say()

'Hello everybody!'
{% endraw %} {% raw %} 
HelloSayer('Jesse Pinkman').say()

'Yo'
{% endraw %}
